units.originalDescription: Introducing the 2026 Yamaha 255XD, the ultimate jet-powered wakesurfer. The 255XD, with its combined 500 horsepower, features cutting-edge DRiVE X technology, exceptional wakesurf performance, and a stylish design. Discover the Ultimate Luxury - Set sail on the epitome of luxury with the brand-new 2026 Yamaha 255XD.This boat boasts unparalleled craftsmanship and performance, promising an exhilarating experience on the water. Premium Power and Performance - Delivering a powerful and efficient ride, the 1.8L High Output engines provides unmatched speed and agility, ensuring a thrilling journey every time you hit the water. Luxurious Features - Step aboard the 2026 Yamaha 255XD and indulge in a world of luxury. From the meticulously designed interiors to the state-of-the-art technology, every detail exudes opulence. Enjoy the spacious deck layout perfect for entertaining guests or relaxing in style.

Its stylish watersports design, powered by robust 1.9L Yamaha engines, offers ample space, storage, and features for the active family to maximize their time on the water. Features include: Cockpit and Bow Snap-in Marine-Grade Woven Floor Mat Ski Locker Removable Dinette Table with Pedestal Mounts at Cockpit and Stern Bow Filler Inserts for Multiple Seating Configurations Hinged Seat Cushions Tilt Steering Adjustable Captain's Chair with Flip-up Bolster Passenger-side Captain's Chair Portside Entertainment Area Lockable Passenger Side Glove Box Walk-through Bow Door Integrated Removable Cooler Head Compartment w/ Light Courtesy Deck Lighting Dedicated Anchor and Rope Locker Bow Reboarding Ladder Upgraded Aluminum Handles & Accents Cockpit Drainage System (CDS) Stern Integrated Swim Platform Upholstered Cushioned Backrests w/ Storage 12-volt Outlet Stainless Steel Telescopic Reboarding Ladder Dinette Table Mount Marine-Grade Mat Stern (Wet) Storage Factory Installed Swim-up Seat Bracket Technical Connext Screen (in) 7 Display w/ Maps Wireless Charging Points 1 Marine Speakers 6 Stern Stereo Remote Stern Speakers 3 position "No Wake Mode™" Control Cruise Assist Battery Setup Dual Rack & Pinion Steering Quiet Cruise Technology Articulating Keel System Engines And Driveline Displacement (per engine) 1898cc Fuel Capacity (gal) 75 Recommended Fuel Regular Unleaded 155 MM High-Pressure Pump Pump Clean-out Ports Oil Capacity per Engine (L) 2.6 Exterior Stainless Steel Bow Rails Stainless Steel Pop-up Cleats 7 Tow Hook BiminiTM Top Aluminum Folding Wakeboard Tower with Tow Hook Windshield Mirror

units.originalDescription: 2026 YAMAHA GP HO WITH AUDIO IN NIGHTSHADE! In Stock & Ready for Delivery! 200hp! 1.9L High output! 3 Seater! Bluetooth speakers! Footwell floor drains! Racing inspired Handlebars! New color for 2026! We Sell trailers & offer great Financing! We accept Trades!
units.aiDescription: 2026 Yamaha Boats GP HO WITH AUDIO — available now at Toms River Marine and Motorsports. Contact us for pricing and availability.

units.originalDescription: POWER & PERFORMANCE Powered by a supercharged 4-cylinder, 4-stroke, 1.8 Liter Super Vortex High Output Yamaha Marine Engine delivering 250 hp, the GP SVHO with Audio reaches speeds up to 70 mph. The electronic fuel injection system ensures explosive acceleration, hitting 0–30 mph in approximately 1.5 seconds, paired with an 18.5-gal fuel tank for extended range. The 160mm high-pressure pump delivers superior thrust for racing and sharp maneuvers. DESIGN & COMFORT The lightweight NanoXcel2 hull weighs 758 lbs dry, offering unrivaled agility and durability. Measuring 131.9” long, 48.8” wide, and 47.2” high, this 3-seater features a racing-style seat with sticky vinyl for enhanced grip, deeper self-draining footwells, and Hydro-Turf® deck mats for secure footing during aggressive rides. RIDER FEATURES A 7” Connext® touchscreen display provides clear readouts for speed, RPM, and fuel, with Drive Control for tailored acceleration and a security mode to prevent unauthorized use. The factory-installed Yamaha audio speakers (40W, 4O) deliver high-quality sound, engineered for marine durability against splashing waves. With 28.4-gal total storage, including a glovebox and large bow storage, gear stays secure. RIDE & TRIM FEATURES The RiDE® Throttle Control System allows seamless switching between forward, neutral, and reverse for precise low-speed control and easier docking. The electric trim system with Auto Trim (Cornering and Launch Control) enhances handling, optimizing performance for tight turns and rapid acceleration. GP SVHO FEATURES Built for championship dominance, the GP SVHO with Audio includes a tow hook for watersports, competition steering with tilt-adjustable, exposed race-design handlebars, and a race-proven hull with a top-loader intake grate for superior control. Its white with racing blue or black color scheme adds a bold, aggressive aesthetic to its championship-inspired design. WE ACCEPT TRADES & OFFER FINANCING!
